name: lead-enrichment
description: Multi-source lead enrichment, fully routed through the SELAT Router (MPP). Finds and verifies a work email (Hunter), enriches the lead (Apollo), discovers a phone number and contact details (Clado), and enriches the company (Hunter). One run chains three paid MPP merchants across five steps.

company.description: Lead company name (sent to Apollo as organization_name), e.g. Stripe

domain.description: Company domain used for email finding and company enrichment, e.g. stripe.com

email.description: Known work email to verify; if omitted, supply the email returned by the Hunter Email Finder step

linkedinUrl.description: LinkedIn profile URL, e.g. https://linkedin.com/in/johndoe — used by Apollo people-enrichment and required for the Clado contacts (phone) step

steps.label: find email — Hunter Email Finder (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
verify email — Hunter Email Verifier (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
enrich lead — Apollo People Enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
find phone — Clado Contacts (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
enrich company — Hunter Company Enrichment (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
